check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Attachment Security >> Allow users to demote attachments to Level 2 is set to "Disabled".
 
Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\outlook\security

If the value allowuserstolowerattachments is set to REG_DWORD = 0, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Security Form Settings >> Attachment Security >> Allow users to demote attachments to Level 2 to "Disabled".
title: The ability to demote attachments from Level 2 to Level 1 must be disabled.
